reforms.description: The Finnish government merged institutions promoting innovation, exports, and investment into Business Finland, a one-stop-shop designed to facilitate network projects that respond to business needs and contribute to financing them, particularly focusing on cooperation between companies and universities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to enhance collaboration between businesses and research institutions, which is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially enacted and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The merger of multiple institutions into a single entity represents a significant structural change in the innovation support system.
reforms.source_quote: Measures are also being taken to foster entrepreneurship, including from 2018 the merger of institutions promoting innovation, exports and investment into Business Finland.
